# Clodex

> Clodex is an open-source Agentic IDE for the complete development loop.
> It combines persistent tasks, code, terminals, browser workflows, GitHub,
> MCP, remote machines, agents, automations, and human review.

## Product

Clodex is built around durable engineering tasks rather than isolated prompts.
The task keeps its project context, workspaces, worktrees, shell sessions,
browser state, Pending Edits, agents, artifacts, and review workflow while work
moves from request to verified result.

### Core capabilities

- Persistent Tasks and Projects with search, grouping, resume, and worktrees.
- Multi-file editing, terminal sessions, local services, browser/CDP, logs, and
  visual verification.
- Pending Edits and line-by-line diff review with accept or reject controls.
- GitHub pull-request inspection, inline review, policy gates, and protected
  merge.
- Swarm orchestration and collaboration modes for scoped parallel work.
- Encrypted SSH profiles, connection testing, persistent sessions, remote
  execution, remote paths, and terminal handoff.
- An isolated MCP runtime for stdio, Streamable HTTP, SSE, OAuth, tools,
  resources, prompts, elicitation, timeouts, cancellation, and redaction.
- Skills, signed plugins, publisher identities, pinned private marketplaces,
  staged updates, rollback, integrity validation, and quarantine.
- Generated Apps owned by their source task with preview, regeneration, and an
  experimental capability bridge.
- Agent OS features including memory, Guardian, Quick Task, dictation, desktop
  automation preview, remote control, and protected task artifacts.

## Remote and hybrid execution

Clodex can keep one task while work moves between the local machine, SSH
environments, and controlled cloud execution targets. Cloud Tasks are a preview
and use bounded snapshots, short-lived credentials, event streams, quotas, and
verifiable artifacts. Session Teleport and expiring read-only share links are
experimental.

## Clodex Labs

- Scheduled Tasks and Wake Scheduler: one-time, interval, and cron schedules,
  wake recovery, missed-run policies, retries, capability grants, and
  local/cloud targets.
- Generated App Capability Bridge: explicitly granted read-only MCP calls,
  bounded model questions, automation launch, rate limits, and output limits.
- Executable Extensions: integrity-bound stdio MCP runtimes distributed through
  signed plugins.
- Spaces: encrypted persistent containers for workspaces, links, and
  instructions.
- Session Continuity: cloud readiness, session teleport, expiring share links,
  and revocation.

## Security

- Agent execution, MCP tools, and executable extensions use separate process and
  policy boundaries.
- Credentials use OS-backed encryption and are referenced by ID.
- Sensitive attachments, shell logs, memory, Chronicle, diff history, and
  caches can use AES-256-GCM protected storage.
- Guardian and human approvals gate high-impact shell, browser, network, MCP,
  sandbox, desktop, and remote actions.
- Plugin trust combines catalog signing, publisher signing, package and tree
  integrity, source provenance, rollback, and quarantine.
- Audit events are designed to avoid prompts, code, audio, screenshots, and
  secrets.

## Models

Clodex supports cloud providers, BYOK, existing subscriptions,
OpenAI-compatible endpoints, private infrastructure, and local or self-hosted
inference inside one Agent OS.

## In development

- Task forks and lineage.
- Real archive and restore.
- Goals, token budgets, and time budgets.
- Exact usage and provider rate-limit dashboards.
- Unified permission profiles.
- A task background-process manager.
- Live steering of an active turn.
- Configuration and session import from other agent clients.
- A stronger trusted-hooks model.
- Managed team plugin distribution.
